creator: richard@tector.org.uk
text:
Update of net/jicmp in ports to 1.0.10

NB. ports/135659 is a pre-requisite to this update.

Fix: PORTNAME=      jicmp
-PORTVERSION=   1.0.9
+PORTVERSION=   1.0.10
 CATEGORIES=    net java
 MASTER_SITES=  SF/opennms

@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@
 GNU_CONFIGURE= yes
 CONFIGURE_ENV= JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME}
 USE_LDCONFIG=  yes
-USE_AUTOTOOLS= automake:19
+USE_AUTOTOOLS= automake:110

 pre-everything::
        @${ECHO_MSG}    ""
